description: Unified upload schema for burningman.artelier: Artelier core columns first, then Burning Man extensions.

output_column_groups.artelier_core: Exact 36-column Artelier Registry import contract, preserved in order.
output_column_groups.burning_man_extensions: Appended after core for burningman.artelier. Core-only CSV omits these.

burning_man_extensions.name: bm_uid
burning_man_extensions.description: WWW or archive installation UID.

burning_man_extensions.name: bm_year
burning_man_extensions.description: Burning Man event year (also mirrors project_year).

burning_man_extensions.name: bm_event_name
burning_man_extensions.description: Event label.

burning_man_extensions.name: playa_address
burning_man_extensions.description: WWW Where text (playa location address).

burning_man_extensions.name: playa_latitude
burning_man_extensions.description: Optional future GPS; empty when unknown.

burning_man_extensions.name: playa_longitude
burning_man_extensions.description: Optional future GPS; empty when unknown.

burning_man_extensions.name: honorarium_status
burning_man_extensions.description: Honorarium status when known from collector scrape.

burning_man_extensions.name: theme_camp
burning_man_extensions.description: WWW Camp column.

burning_man_extensions.name: installation_type
burning_man_extensions.description: WWW Type column.

burning_man_extensions.name: source_artist_credit
burning_man_extensions.description: Untouched original artist credit string from source.

burning_man_extensions.name: contributor_display_name
burning_man_extensions.description: Normalized primary contributor display name.

burning_man_extensions.name: additional_contributor_credits
burning_man_extensions.description: Secondary artists/collaborators/collectives as preserved source text.

burning_man_extensions.name: contributor_kind
burning_man_extensions.description: Contributor classification (portal may collapse to person/org/multiple/unknown).

burning_man_extensions.name: contributor_first_name
burning_man_extensions.description: First name when split is clear.

burning_man_extensions.name: contributor_last_name
burning_man_extensions.description: Last name when split is clear.

burning_man_extensions.name: playa_name
burning_man_extensions.description: Alt / Burner name when identified (never the primary legal/canonical name).

burning_man_extensions.name: playa_name_confidence
burning_man_extensions.description: Confidence for playa_name separation.

burning_man_extensions.name: bm_hero_image_source_url
burning_man_extensions.description: BM-side copy of the resolved hero URL for provenance. Canonical Artelier display field remains core hero_image_url (no duplicate header).

burning_man_extensions.name: hero_image_source_page
burning_man_extensions.description: Page URL where the hero image was found.

burning_man_extensions.name: hero_image_attribution
burning_man_extensions.description: Attribution/credit text when available.

burning_man_extensions.name: hero_image_confidence
burning_man_extensions.description: Hero image confidence or review status.

burning_man_extensions.name: review_flags
burning_man_extensions.description: Pipe-delimited machine-readable issue codes only.

burning_man_extensions.name: source_provenance
burning_man_extensions.description: Pipe-delimited list of datasets that contributed fields.

processing_modes.fast_upload: Default portal/ingest path: cache-first, local identity fallback, zero open-web identity searches.
processing_modes.deep_research: Optional separate run_identity.py path with explicit network search; never started by upload.
